title: Earth Animals
description: Minecraft Earth animal variants without OptiFine/CEM!
body:
_(Want more vanilla+ animal variants? Check out [**Clucking Ducks**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clucking-ducks) and [**Frog Concept Variants**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants)!)_ New animal variants have been added to Minecraft in the Spring To Life drop, but the variants introduced in Minecraft Earth have been left out. Until now! This pack adds **every pig, cow, chicken, wolf, and cat variant** from Minecraft Earth to Minecraft as variants that can be found in your world, with both adult and baby textures! **No OptiFine or CEM required!** (Will probably be made optional in the future for improving some models). Some variants have **extra drops** too ([**Earth Animals: Extra Drops**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals-extra-drops) required)! This pack is compatible with all of my other mob variant data packs, including [**Clucking Ducks**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clucking-ducks), which adds a Duck variant for chickens, inspired by Minecraft Dungeons! "Spawn Egg" textures can be obtained in survival with the [**Easter Eggs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spawn-egg-easter-eggs) resource pack!



Pig Variants | **Variant** | **Biome/Location(s)** | |:--------------------:|--------------| | Muddy Pig | Plains, Sunflower Plains | | Dried Muddy Pig | Plains, Sunflower Plains | | Mottled Pig | Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Cherry Grove | | Pale Pig | Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Forest | | Piebald Pig | Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna, Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands, Cherry Grove | | Pink-Footed Pig | Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Forest, Cherry Grove | | Sooty Pig | Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna | | Spotted Pig | Swamp, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna, Villages |
Cow Variants | **Variant** | **Biome/Location(s)** | |:--------------------:|--------------| | Moobloom | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest | | Wooly Cow | Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Forest | | Moolip | Sunflower Plains, Flower Forest | | Albino Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Forest | | Ashen Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Snowy Taiga, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands | | Cream Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna | | Cookie Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga | | Dairy Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle | | Pinto Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga | | Sunset Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands | | Umbra Cow | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Dark Forest |
Chicken Variants | **Variant** | **Biome/Location(s)** | |:--------------------:|--------------| | Cluckshroom | Mushroom Fields | | Amber Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna | | Bronzed Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle | | Gold Crested Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Savanna, Savanna Plateau, Windswept Savanna, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands | | Midnight Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Windswept Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle | | Skewbald Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, Badlands, Eroded Badlands, Wooded Badlands | | Stormy Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Old Growth Pine Taiga, Old Growth Spruce Taiga | | Fancy Chicken | Plains, Sunflower Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Bamboo Jungle |
Wolf Variants | **Variant** | **Biome/Location(s)** | |:--------------------:|--------------| | Skeleton Wolf | Wooded Badlands (only during full moon) |
Cat Variants | **Variant** | **Biome/Location(s)** | |:--------------------:|--------------| | Dyed Cat | Villages, Swamp Huts |

All vanilla variants of animals can still be found where they can be found normally. You can also get the spawn eggs for each variant using functions! More information coming soon. (textures are still being completed) ## If playing with world generation data packs: This data pack changes the Mushroom Fields biome to spawn Cluckshrooms (chickens). If using another data pack that modifies worldgen (particularly the Mushroom Fields biome), make sure that that data pack is loaded ABOVE Earth Animals before generating the world in order to get that data pack's custom mushroom fields generation. ## Credits: - Mojang, for designing Minecraft Earth textures - MinecraftFan1000, for Dyed Cat texture

### Both the data pack AND the resource pack must be loaded!
